content.situation: 朋友帮你照看了宠物几天，你见到他时表达感谢并称赞他照顾得很好
content.speakerText: I really appreciate you taking care of my cat while I was away.
content.speakerTextCn: 我很感激你在我外出时照顾我的猫。
content.responseTemplate: ___, it was such a relief to know she was in good hands.
content.hint: 当别人为你做了好事，表达感谢时常用这个短语，语气真诚自然

content.situation: 朋友说他帮你照看狗狗时，狗狗特别乖，你回应时想表达这是你应该做的，不值一提
content.speakerText: Your dog was so well-behaved—I didn't have to do anything!
content.speakerTextCn: 你的狗特别乖，我根本没做什么！
content.responseTemplate: ___, I know how much you care about animals.

blanks.answer: It was the least I could do
options: It was the least I could do
I did it for the treats

content.hint: 当别人轻描淡写你的付出时，用这句话表达谦逊和礼貌
content.knowledgePoint: 谦逊回应他人赞美的固定表达

content.situation: 朋友夸你照顾宠物特别细心，你感到被认可但想保持轻松自然的语气
content.speakerText: You're the most thoughtful pet-sitter I've ever met!
content.speakerTextCn: 你是我见过最体贴的宠物保姆！
content.hint: 当被高度赞美时，英语母语者常用这个短语表达既开心又有点不好意思
content.knowledgePoint: 回应过度赞美时的自然表达
